message:
test(fcp-core): expand lifecycle, supply_chain, error test suites (+191 tests)

lifecycle: +70 tests (164→234) — state machine multi-hop sequences,
HealthMetrics boundaries, CanaryPolicy validation, LifecycleRecord
builder/serde, TransitionReason edge cases, CrashLoopDetector
advanced scenarios, canary expiry boundaries.

supply_chain: +65 tests (123→188) — attestation/SBOM constants,
CanonicalEncoding/HashAlgorithm/SbomFormat traits, TrustRootBinding
validation, VerificationPipeline scenarios (allow_unsigned, SLSA
levels, trusted builders, digest matching), evidence determinism,
canonicalize_json edge cases.

error: +56 tests (95→151) — Display messages for all 22 FcpError
variants, Clone/Debug/serde roundtrips by category, numeric_code
consistency, external error code mapping, details() for all variants,
hint content, boundary values, exhaustive retryable coverage,
to_response matches Display.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
